UNAUTHORIZED_HEADER.message: An authentication token is required in the Authorization header with Bearer <token> format

TOKEN_INVALID.message: The provided authentication token is invalid or has expired

USER_NOT_FOUND.message: The user associated with the token no longer exists in the system

AUTH_REQUIRED.message: Prior authentication is required to verify the role

FORBIDDEN_ROLE.message: Access denied: the {{role}} role is required to perform this operation

PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 6 characters long
NAME_TOO_SHORT: Name must be at least 2 characters long

EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED.message: The specified email is already registered in the system

INCOMPLETE_CREDENTIALS.message: You must provide both email and password

INVALID_CREDENTIALS.message: The email or password is incorrect

INVALID_CARD_ID: The card ID must be a valid integer

CARD_NOT_FOUND.message: The requested card does not exist

CARD_TYPE_NOT_FOUND: The specified card type does not exist
RARITY_NOT_FOUND: The specified rarity does not exist

FAVORITE_ALREADY_EXISTS.message: This card is already in your favorites

FAVORITE_NOT_FOUND.message: The specified favorite does not exist for this user

TRANSLATIONS_EMPTY: Must have at least one translation
